mapper.select: select id, name, type from facility_info where is_deleted = 0 and id in (select facility_id from apartment_facility where apartment_id = #{apartmentId} and is_deleted = 0)
select id, name, type,icon from facility_info where is_deleted = 0 and id in (select facility_id from room_facility where room_id = #{roomId} and is_deleted = 0)
